violations.current_code:
# Step 7: Hover over info icon (desktop) or click (mobile/tablet)
complimentary_info_icon = print_history_page.complimentary_pages_info_icon
expect(complimentary_info_icon).to_be_visible(timeout=30000)
complimentary_info_icon.hover()
page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
complimentary_tooltip = print_history_page.complimentary_pages_tooltip
expect(complimentary_tooltip).to_be_visible(timeout=30000)
expect(complimentary_tooltip).to_contain_text("complimentary", timeout=30000)
violations.expected_code:
# Step 7: Hover over info icon (desktop) or click (mobile/tablet)
complimentary_info_icon = print_history_page.complimentary_pages_info_icon
expect(complimentary_info_icon).to_be_visible(timeout=30000)
# Device-specific interaction: hover for desktop, click for mobile/tablet
if page.viewport_size['width'] >= 768:
    complimentary_info_icon.hover()
else:
    complimentary_info_icon.click()
page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
complimentary_tooltip = print_history_page.complimentary_pages_tooltip
expect(complimentary_tooltip).to_be_visible(timeout=30000)
expect(complimentary_tooltip).to_contain_text("complimentary", timeout=30000)
violations.explanation: The test case explicitly states 'For Desktop: Move the mouse cursor on the info icon. For Mobile/Tablet: Click on the info icon.' The current implementation only uses hover() which is desktop-specific. The mapping report does not provide a device-specific interaction helper, but the test case requires conditional logic based on device type. The script should check viewport width or device type and use hover() for desktop (width >= 768) or click() for mobile/tablet (width < 768).

This checkpoint was initially flagged but upon closer inspection, all expect() calls in the script have explicit timeout parameters. This violation record is included for completeness but should be marked as false positive during review.

fix_details.note: All expect() assertions have explicit timeout parameters. No fix needed.

violations.current_code:
# Precondition 1: Create new account and enroll printer with 50+ pages plan
tenant_email = common.generate_tenant_email()
common.create_new_ii_v2_account(page)
page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=60000)
framework_logger.info(f"Precondition 1: Fresh account created with tenant_email={tenant_email}")

# Create and claim virtual printer
printer_data = common.create_and_claim_virtual_printer_and_add_address()
assert printer_data is not None, "Printer creation failed"
assert printer_data.entity_id is not None, "Printer entity_id is None"
framework_logger.info(f"Precondition 1: Virtual printer created with entity_id={printer_data.entity_id}, enrollment started")

# Start enrollment and select 50 pages plan
EnrollmentHelper.start_enrollment_and_sign_in(page, tenant_email, timeout=720)
page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=30000)
framework_logger.info("Precondition 1 (continued): Enrollment started")

# Select printer and 50 pages plan
EnrollmentHelper.select_printer(page, printer_index=0)
page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=30000)
framework_logger.info("Precondition 1 (continued): Printer selected")
violations.expected_code:
# Precondition 1: Create new account and enroll printer with 50+ pages plan
tenant_email = common.generate_tenant_email()
common.create_new_ii_v2_account(page)
page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=60000)
printer_data = common.create_and_claim_virtual_printer_and_add_address()
assert printer_data is not None, "Printer creation failed"
assert printer_data.entity_id is not None, "Printer entity_id is None"
EnrollmentHelper.start_enrollment_and_sign_in(page, tenant_email, timeout=720)
page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=30000)
EnrollmentHelper.select_printer(page, printer_index=0)
page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=30000)
plan_data = common.get_filtered_plan_data(key='pages', value=50)
assert plan_data is not None, "50 pages plan not found in available plans"
EnrollmentHelper.select_plan(page, plan_data)
page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
EnrollmentHelper.complete_enrollment_flow(page)
page.wait_for_timeout(5000)
sub_id = common.subscription_data_from_gemini(tenant_email).get('id')
assert sub_id is not None, "Enrollment failed - no subscription ID found"
framework_logger.info(f"Precondition 1 completed: Printer enrolled with 50 pages plan - tenant_email={tenant_email}, entity_id={printer_data.entity_id}, sub_id={sub_id}")
violations.explanation: Precondition 1 has 7 separate framework_logger.info() calls for sub-steps within a single precondition. The coding standards recommend 1 log line per step to keep logging concise. While preconditions can have more detailed logging than test steps, 7 log lines for one precondition is excessive. This should be consolidated to 1-2 log lines: one at the start and one comprehensive log at completion with all key data (tenant_email, entity_id, sub_id).

fix_details.find:
framework_logger.info(f"Precondition 1: Fresh account created with tenant_email={tenant_email}")

# Create and claim virtual printer
printer_data = common.create_and_claim_virtual_printer_and_add_address()
assert printer_data is not None, "Printer creation failed"
assert printer_data.entity_id is not None, "Printer entity_id is None"
framework_logger.info(f"Precondition 1: Virtual printer created with entity_id={printer_data.entity_id}, enrollment started")

# Start enrollment and select 50 pages plan
EnrollmentHelper.start_enrollment_and_sign_in(page, tenant_email, timeout=720)
page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=30000)
framework_logger.info("Precondition 1 (continued): Enrollment started")

# Select printer and 50 pages plan
EnrollmentHelper.select_printer(page, printer_index=0)
page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=30000)
framework_logger.info("Precondition 1 (continued): Printer selected")

# Get 50 pages plan data
plan_data = common.get_filtered_plan_data(key='pages', value=50)
assert plan_data is not None, "50 pages plan not found in available plans"
EnrollmentHelper.select_plan(page, plan_data)
page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
framework_logger.info("Precondition 1 (continued): 50 pages plan selected")

# Complete enrollment
EnrollmentHelper.complete_enrollment_flow(page)
page.wait_for_timeout(5000)
framework_logger.info("Precondition 1 (continued): Enrollment completed")

# Get subscription ID
sub_id = common.subscription_data_from_gemini(tenant_email).get('id')
assert sub_id is not None, "Enrollment failed - no subscription ID found"
framework_logger.info(f"Precondition 1 completed: Printer enrolled with 50 pages plan - Subscription ID={sub_id}")
fix_details.replace_with:
# Create and claim virtual printer
printer_data = common.create_and_claim_virtual_printer_and_add_address()
assert printer_data is not None, "Printer creation failed"
assert printer_data.entity_id is not None, "Printer entity_id is None"

# Start enrollment and select 50 pages plan
EnrollmentHelper.start_enrollment_and_sign_in(page, tenant_email, timeout=720)
page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=30000)

# Select printer and 50 pages plan
EnrollmentHelper.select_printer(page, printer_index=0)
page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle", timeout=30000)

# Get 50 pages plan data
plan_data = common.get_filtered_plan_data(key='pages', value=50)
assert plan_data is not None, "50 pages plan not found in available plans"
EnrollmentHelper.select_plan(page, plan_data)
page.wait_for_timeout(2000)

# Complete enrollment
EnrollmentHelper.complete_enrollment_flow(page)
page.wait_for_timeout(5000)

# Get subscription ID
sub_id = common.subscription_data_from_gemini(tenant_email).get('id')
assert sub_id is not None, "Enrollment failed - no subscription ID found"
framework_logger.info(f"Precondition 1 completed: Printer enrolled with 50 pages plan - tenant_email={tenant_email}, entity_id={printer_data.entity_id}, sub_id={sub_id}")

fix_priority_order.fix_approach: Add device-specific interaction logic for tooltip info icons. Check viewport width or device type and use hover() for desktop (width >= 768) or click() for mobile/tablet (width < 768). This matches the test case requirement: 'For Desktop: Move the mouse cursor on the info icon. For Mobile/Tablet: Click on the info icon.'

Consolidate precondition 1 logging from 7 separate log lines to 1 comprehensive log line at completion with all key data (tenant_email, entity_id, sub_id). This follows the coding standard of keeping logging concise with 1 log line per step.
